content.en:
"Lord Heavenly Emperor, hasn't the Void Sacred Tree grown yet?"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master asked again.

"Not yet, but soon!" "According to my estimates, in a few million years, the Void Sacred Tree should be able to give birth to the Void Sacred Fruit." Once the Void Sacred Fruit is born, the location of the Void Sacred Tree is revealed. However, I know the location of the Void Sacred Tree, and I can enter the Void Sacred Tree in advance, once the Void Holy Fruit is ripe, I can take the lead in taking the Void Holy Fruit, and the other domain ancestors have no time to compete with me, even the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors can't compete with me. "

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master nodded one after another.

Abrupt.

The Vast Sea Ancestor said in a deep voice: "Some elite domain ancestors of the Divine Heaven Realm have also come, they are following me, and now I am afraid that they are about to arrive." There's no way, I can't get rid of them completely, once they also come to the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, I'm afraid they're going to trouble me!"

"What then?"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master panicked.

"Next, the two of you will stay in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, open the big array, and don't leave. I'm going to go directly to the void where the Void Sacred Tree is located, and wait until the Void Holy Fruit is ripe, if the Heavenly Emperor Palace really can't be saved, you can escape as soon as possible, leave with the foundation of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and wait for me to return!"

Haohai Haizu arranged.

"Yes, Emperor of Heaven!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord responded.

"Remember, as long as the two of you know about this matter, you can't tell anyone else, otherwise the Heavenly Emperor Palace will be chaotic!"

Hao Hai Ancestor reminded.

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master repeatedly promised that they would not be leaked.

Wow!

The Vast Sea Ancestor left the Heavenly Emperor Palace, followed his perception of the Void Sacred Tree, passed through layers of void, and finally came to a special space.

Rumble!!!!

A huge Void Sacred Tree was rooted in the void, absorbing the power of the Void Forbidden Realm.

"This is the Void Sacred Tree!"

The Mighty Sea Ancestor muttered.

It was the first time he had seen the Void Sacred Tree, after all, this Void Sacred Tree was just a seed in the first place.

The Void Sacred Tree is transparent, and ordinary people can't see it if they look at the Void Sacred Tree, and only a domain ancestor like him can easily see the Void Sacred Tree.

On the top of the Void Sacred Tree, there is an unripe Void Sacred Fruit, and this Void Sacred Fruit is absorbing the power of the outside world and growing little by little.

The Vast Sea Ancestor did not interfere with the growth of the Void Sacred Tree, he found a random place nearby to sit cross-legged and began to meditate on his meditation.

Cultivating here is much better than the outside world.

"It's not bad to practice here for millions of years, it's enough to improve your strength a little!"

Hao Hai Ancestor thought to himself.

------------------

Ye Tian didn't know that the Haohai Sea Ancestor had returned, in fact, at his level, he didn't care about the Haohai Sea Ancestor at all.

this day.

There are several more domain ancestors in the Daoshan realm.

They are the five elite domain ancestors from the Divine Heaven Realm, and they are veteran elite domain ancestors, and their strength is vaguely above the vast sea ancestors, if a few people join forces, it is enough to severely damage the vast sea area ancestors, and they are even expected to kill him.

If the Ancestor of the Great Sea was here, he would naturally recognize it.

They were the Six Extremes Domain Ancestor, the Cangyan Domain Ancestor, the Thousand Variation Domain Ancestor, the Tianyin Domain Ancestor, and the Moyu Domain Ancestor.

"A new realm, and the lifespan of this realm is probably only one-third of the way has passed!" said the Sixth Extreme Domain Ancestor excitedly.

Several other Domain Ancestors were also extremely excited, this was a brand new realm!

In the vast and extremely dangerous dark forbidden realm, how difficult it is to find a new realm!

Their five domain ancestors did not belong to the same force, but came from the five forces, and they had just joined forces to track down the vast sea ancestors before.

Now, they have found this realm, and one by one they are separated.

Soon after.

They knew about the realm.

This is a very weak realm, and the most powerful world here is the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, and it has been promoted from an ordinary universe to a forbidden realm in a short period of time, which is not normal!

So, they came to the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm one after another.

It's not the same as the ancestor of the vast sea.

The Vast Sea Ancestor had the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and after entering the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, he immediately shuttled into the Heavenly Emperor Palace, almost attracting no people's attention.

And these five domain ancestors had no place to stay, and they needed to find out the news, so their existence was quickly exposed.

The human world.

A half-step domain ancestor of the human race, that is, a legion leader of the Nine Extremes Legion, Fengchi Dao Ancestor, reported the intelligence that Youyu Ancestor had infiltrated into the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

"There is a domain ancestor who has entered the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, it seems that the vast sea ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace has also come!"

Ye Tian muttered.

"The Terrans don't care about them for the time being!"

Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes!"

Wind gallop Dao ancestor answered.

......

War Tower.

This area is very prosperous, and it has almost become the center of cultivation in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

Countless cultivators are cultivating here, after all, even if they can't enter the Battle Realm Tower, this large forbidden void realm is also a treasure land!

And at this time, the Six Extremes Domain Ancestors also came here.

The Warworld Tower can communicate with the powerhouses of the Dark Sanctuary, and can also be exchanged for inheritance in the Dark Sanctuary.

There is no such treasure land in the Divine Heaven Realm!

Knowing this, they immediately came, wanting to enter the War Realm Tower to have a look.

As for other things, they are put on the back for the time being.

Subsequently, these five domain ancestors entered the Battle Realm Tower one by one, and challenged several times at the level of the Domain Ancestor of the Battle Realm Tower.

As a result, all the initial points were lost.

They were completely abused by the elite domain ancestors of the Dark Sanctuary, and they couldn't beat the domain ancestors of the dark Sanctuary at all.

They even exchanged some of the treasures on their bodies for points, and instead of continuing to challenge, they exchanged for a secret technique that was good for them, at least they exchanged the treasures they didn't need for a secret technique that was useful to them, and once they practiced it, they could also improve their strength a little.

They're interested in many of the legacies in the Warworld Tower, but they don't have enough points!

And the challenge with the elite domain ancestors of the Dark Sanctuary Realm can't be beaten.

How do I get a lot of points?

After the five elite domain ancestors pondered for a while, they prepared the half-step domain ancestors of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm to start.

The Xuanxu Forbidden Realm can give birth to a large number of Forbidden Treasures, and in the Divine Heaven Realm, how precious the Forbidden Treasures are!

And here, it's like not wanting money, it's too much!

Therefore, the half-step domain ancestors here are probably higher than many domain ancestors.

If they robbed the half-step domain ancestors here, their net worth would skyrocket many times.

As a result, some half-step domain ancestors were unlucky!

But in fact, it was not these half-step domain ancestors who were really unlucky, but themselves!
